headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Digital Realty Trust, Raises Price Target to $220
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Eric Luebchow   maintains Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $195 to $220.
